## Enforcement

When reviewing or writing code in this project, apply these rules automatically.
Do not wait to be asked — flag violations proactively and suggest the minimal correct fix.

Severity scale:
- 🔴 High — block the change, must be fixed
- 🟡 Medium — fix this before shipping
- 🟢 Low — improve when touching this area

When flagging an issue, always provide:
1. Which rule was violated
2. The exact line or pattern
3. A concrete corrected version

Never give generic advice. Always tie findings to the actual code.
